12:12:46	 From Warren Phillips : Does F+S work well over $10 on a supplement sample?

12:12:51	 From Joey Alter : how do you handle customer complaints during pricing tests? my clients in the past have been reticent to test pricing because of customer complaints / legal issues

12:13:37	 From Greg White : if they complain refund to the low price

12:14:10	 From Warren Phillips : It is the international piece that is stopping me

12:14:24	 From Warren Phillips : Got it

12:16:04	 From Joey Alter : lol sounds good

12:16:07	 From Tom Merritt : I know this is prob overthinking - but, if you have an online store that is getting repurchases on an old “lower” price, and you are testing new pricing that is *higher*, and it does better … how do you handle the old organic purchasers at the lower price

12:16:28	 From Stefan Georgi : Tom will get to your question in a minute

12:16:32	 From Tom Merritt : Thanks!

12:18:06	 From Matt Shuebrook : In terms of monthly subscription vs straight sale- would you test this early on or would you wait til you have other spots dialed in?

12:19:01	 From Jared Nations : Agora does a great example of tiered orders and dummy offers 

12:19:09	 From Jared Nations : Banyan Hill especially 

12:19:40	 From Sam Robson : What if you’re selling supplement stacks, like 3 products in one order? Is it better to test multiple stacks in an order vs autoship/one-time?

12:19:44	 From Tom Merritt : Makes sense, thank you!

12:20:01	 From Tom Merritt : Cool thanks

12:21:28	 From Warren Phillips : It hurts you EPCs is the bigger deal

12:21:32	 From Warren Phillips : Or a big deal

12:23:03	 From Steve Erl : Probably cut down charge backs a lot by doing that too

12:27:43	 From aimee.kunau : Installment plans are HUGE

12:28:22	 From Mike Buontempo : ya i have that

12:28:26	 From Mike Buontempo : works well

12:28:56	 From Mike Buontempo : it's free money

12:28:57	 From Mike Buontempo : really

12:29:32	 From Mike Buontempo : or just have it be a downsell

12:29:39	 From Mike Buontempo : pick up an extra 10% conversion

12:29:39	 From aimee.kunau : With installments you need to also have a collections and management plan

12:34:42	 From Mike Buontempo : thats pretty good!

12:34:55	 From Stefan Georgi : Dooo it!

12:36:26	 From Mike Buontempo : Cialdini

12:37:07	 From Tom : Sounds like a pretty effective IQ test at the same time.

12:37:16	 From Tom Merritt : see this offer everywhere

12:37:48	 From Mike Buontempo : ya it's kinda confusing

12:38:17	 From Mike Buontempo : do you know how many sales a day they're doing with that offer

12:40:19	 From Sam Robson : https://sculptnation.com/product/fat-loss-stack/

12:40:24	 From Maranda : What would be your suggestion on pricing for subscription.  Say first month is $47, would you increase the price for the subscription or keep it the same

12:43:25	 From Matt Shuebrook : Would adding benefits to being on subscription make a difference for Sam’s offer? For instance “Our customers who sign up for a 3 month plan burn 37% more fat than people who only take the 1 month option”

12:44:47	 From Maranda : That’s a great idea!

12:46:56	 From Joey Percia : 60% of the time it works every time

12:47:14	 From Sam Robson : YES Joey!

12:50:03	 From Joey Percia : Didn’t get to share a win (was looking at a daycare lol) but… got a 52% take rate on an OTO1 on a clients offer. Internal
